title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at InfraMantra

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at InfraMantra
jsonLd.description:
InfraMantra, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About InfraMantra:
InfraMantra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with InfraMantra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
